notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-391 — Fix: adding a 🎯 My-pick on mobile now shows its result inline at the form (green ✓ added / red with the reason). Previously the message appeared at the top of the panel, off-screen on a phone, so ＋ Add looked like it did nothing. Reminder: stop must be BELOW buy, sell ABOVE buy. Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
